full_text:
He Da 賀達
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Da (賀達)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Committed many misdeeds but let off due to battle achievements. Gave money away. He Da was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
